get.description:
Health check endpoint.

Returns a simple OK response to indicate the service is running.
Used by load balancers and container orchestrators for liveness checks.

Returns:
    dict with "ok" (bool) and "service" (str) fields

List library objects with pagination.

Query Parameters:
    skip: Number of items to skip (default: 0, max: 10000)
    limit: Maximum items to return (default: 20, max: 100)

parameters.name: limit

schema.description: Maximum number of items to return
schema.title: Limit

parameters.description: Maximum number of items to return

get.description:
Get detailed information about a library object.

Returns the object overview, current release, visibility settings,
token count, and share link count.

Path Parameters:
    object_id: The library object ID

Revoke the session credential and clear browser cookies.

get.description:
Search the skill registry.

Returns matching skills with their latest versions, install references,
and OpenClaw runtime metadata.

Query Parameters:
    q: Search query string (max 200 chars)
    limit: Maximum results to return (1-20, default: 8)
    scope: Search scope - "public" (no auth), "me" (authenticated),
           or "grant" (grant-scoped, requires grant credential)

schema.title: Response Search Registry Api V1 Search Get
